categories.label: General Purpose Agents
categories.description: Versatile AI agents capable of handling a broad spectrum of tasks — reasoning through complex problems, using tools, browsing the web, writing code, and executing multi-step plans.

categories.label: Coding & Engineering Agents
categories.description: Autonomous software engineers that read codebases, write tests, fix bugs, deploy features, and manage entire development cycles with minimal human oversight.

categories.label: Web Browsing Agents
categories.description: Agents that autonomously navigate the web — clicking, scrolling, extracting data, filling forms, and completing online tasks just like a human would.

categories.label: Research & Analysis Agents
categories.description: Deep research agents that autonomously gather intelligence, analyze data, synthesize academic papers, and produce comprehensive reports across any domain.

categories.label: Sales & Outreach Agents
categories.description: AI agents that autonomously prospect, personalize outreach, follow up with leads, book meetings, and accelerate the entire B2B sales pipeline end-to-end.

categories.label: Customer Support Agents
categories.description: Autonomous support agents that resolve tickets, answer questions, process refunds, and escalate to humans — delivering 24/7 support at scale without growing headcount.

categories.label: Data & Analytics Agents
categories.description: Agents that query databases in natural language, build dashboards, run Python analysis, detect anomalies, and generate data-driven insights without requiring SQL expertise.

categories.label: Content & Marketing Agents
categories.description: Agents that autonomously plan, write, publish, and distribute content — managing entire content calendars, SEO pipelines, and social media strategies end-to-end.

categories.label: Operations & Workflow Agents
categories.description: Agents that automate internal business operations — HR workflows, finance approvals, document processing, scheduling, and cross-system orchestration without human bottlenecks.

categories.label: Multi-Agent Frameworks
categories.description: Frameworks for building swarms of cooperating AI agents — enabling complex, parallelized workflows where specialized agents hand off tasks, debate outputs, and collectively solve hard problems.

categories.label: Personal Productivity Agents
categories.description: AI agents that act as your personal chief of staff — managing your inbox, organizing your calendar, summarizing documents, and handling the cognitive overhead of modern knowledge work.

categories.label: Finance & Trading Agents
categories.description: AI agents for financial analysis, automated trading, expense management, financial modeling, and market intelligence.

categories.label: Dev Infrastructure & DevOps Agents
categories.description: AI agents that monitor systems, debug incidents, manage infrastructure as code, write and review pipelines, and keep production systems running autonomously.

categories.label: Agent Builder Platforms
categories.description: No-code and low-code platforms for building, deploying, and managing custom AI agents — enabling any team to create production-grade agents without deep ML expertise.
